doc_title_en: Notice of Implementation of 10th Anniversary Listing Commemorative Dividend

key_facts.reason_jp: 上場10周年記念、株主への感謝と企業成長への決意

summary_en: 92 yen/share FY3/27 (82 yen ordinary + 10 yen commemorative). Interim 45 yen (35 ordinary + 10 commemorative), year-end 47 yen ordinary. Prior year FY3/26: 77 yen/share total.
summary_jp: FY3/27年間配当92円/株（普通82円+記念10円）。中間配当45円（普通35円+記念10円）、期末配当47円。前年度FY3/26は77円/株。
tag_en: Dividend - 92 yen/share FY3/27 (82 yen ordinary + 10 yen commemorative) - Listing 10th Anniversary
tag_jp: 配当 - 92円/株 FY3/27（普通82円+記念10円）- 上場10周年
